creator: ilmar@ints.ru
text:
While openning /dev/audio PC freeses and i have to use BIG power off
	button. :( This situation last for about 2-3 months, earlier sound
	worked.

Fix: 

do not use audio at all. ;-) I have to delete audio devs to make kde
	work.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Just open /dev/audio in midnight commander for ex. (push F3)
